title: RealLogin
description: Login plugin with PIN & GUI interaction
body:
# RealLogin

Welcome to **RealLogin**!  
This is a brand-new authentication plugin designed to be **lightweight** and **easy to use**.  
Try it for yourself!  

📊 **Metrics**: [bStats - RealLogin](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/RealLogin/12577)  

---

## 🔥 Features  

✅ **YAML Configuration**  
✅ **Translatable System**  
✅ **PIN System**  
✅ **Reset System**  
✅ **Easy-to-use GUI**  
✅ **Flexible Database System**  

---

## 🖼️ Photos  
🔽 **Plugin Screenshots** 🔽  
  ![pin gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9895f1f215621480ce4e88297f5b4f72938428ff.png)

---

## 📌 Support & Requirements  

- **Supported Minecraft Versions**: 1.13 to 1.19  
- **Required Java Version**: Java 8  

If you experience any issues with the plugin, feel free to **contact me via DM on Spigot**.  

---

## ⚡ Commands & Permissions  

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| `/reallogin` | Main plugin command. | `reallogin.command` |
| `/reallogin reload` | Reloads the configuration. | `reallogin.reload` |
| `/reallogin resetpin` | Resets the player's PIN. | `reallogin.resetpin` |

---

Enjoy **RealLogin** and make player authentication easier! 🚀
